seating_notes.family_recommendation: Right Field Lower (Sections 128-138) for kids — access to Kohl's Kids Zone, Bernie Brewer slide visible on home runs, affordable ($20-40/ticket). Left Field Lower (106-113) for better home plate sightlines at similar prices. Right Field Terrace Bleachers (422-435) for the most affordable option.
seating_notes.avoid: Infield box seats (expensive, kids get restless) and far upper-deck corners.
seating_notes.venue_notes: Retractable roof — no rain worries. May evenings can be cold (40s-50s), dress kids in layers for night games.
